tier.seed.name: SEED
tier.seed.desc: ZSM active · No LLM · Local memory
tier.seed.next: Connect an inference engine: zana setup
tier.seed.caps:
✓ Converse (sovereign mode)
✓ Save reminders
✓ Track household expenses
✓ View your DNA: zana aeon dna

tier.sprout.desc: LLM connected · Full chat · No persistent memory
tier.sprout.caps:

✓ Natural reasoning
✓ Everything from SEED
tier.sprout.locked:

✗ Semantic vault → requires GROVE

tier.grove.caps:
✓ Full episodic memory

tier.forest.caps:

zsm.sovereign_banner: Sovereign Mode active. No LLM, no network. Your Aeon stays with you.
zsm.no_llm_tip: With an LLM engine you unlock natural conversation. Run: zana setup
zsm.greeting.llama: 🔥 I'm here. Tell me what we're building.
zsm.greeting.oraculo: ◈ The pattern emerges. What do you observe?
zsm.greeting.forja: ⚙️ Systems online. What shall we forge?
zsm.greeting.marea: ~ Flow active. Where are we navigating?
zsm.greeting.raiz: 🌳 Grounded. What do we plant today?
zsm.greeting.vacio: ∅ Fertile void. What do we invoke?
zsm.intent.help:
Available sovereign capabilities:
  • Reminders: 'remind me to...'
  • Calculations: 'how much is 15% of 200'
  • Household economy: 'I spent 50 on groceries'
  • Memory: 'what do you remember about...'
  • Language lesson: 'teach me Spanish'
  • Time and date: 'what time is it'
zsm.response.math_error: Could not calculate that. Try: '15% of 200' or '3 * 450'
zsm.response.economy_empty: No economic records yet. Tell me: 'I spent 50 on groceries'
zsm.response.no_vault: No vault indexed. Run: zana init
zsm.response.no_memory: No episodic memories yet. They fill up with your conversations.
zsm.response.cook_no_vault: Without a vault I can't search recipes. Tell me the ingredients and I'll suggest something basic.
zsm.response.unknown: Understood. Without an LLM I can't reason about that. Run: zana setup
satellite.onboarding.hello:
Hello {username}! I'm {host_aeon}, the sovereign node of {host_name}.
What would you like to name your personal Aeon?
satellite.onboarding.ask_name: What will you name your Aeon?
satellite.onboarding.ask_lang:
In which language should your Aeon speak to you?
🇪🇸 es  🇺🇸 en  🇧🇷 pt  🇫🇷 fr  🇮🇹 it  🇩🇪 de
satellite.onboarding.ready: ✓ {aeon_name} has awakened. You can talk to your Aeon now.
satellite.user.unknown: Access restricted. Ask the node administrator for an invitation.
satellite.user.invite_expired: The invitation code has expired. Request a new one.
satellite.status.stopped: Satellite stopped. Run: zana satellite start
satellite.configure.invalid_token: Invalid token for {platform}. Check the token and try again.
satellite.users.empty: No registered users yet. Invite someone: zana satellite invite
